# Dist package: Codex Agent PowerShell Skill Kit

This directory is the package payload intended for AiCoding's `dist/` area.

The canonical repo-scoped runtime skill is installed to:

```text
.agents/skills/codex-agent-powershell-skill-kit
```

The plugin package mirror is located at:

```text
dist/codex-agent-powershell-skill-kit/plugins/AiCodingPowerShellSkillKit
```
